query:
OK.. scope for crt-036 is proposed: SCOPE.md — crt-037 Summary                                                                                                                                     
                                                                                                                                                                 
  Problem: 79% of active entries (868/1,093) are isolated from PPR traversal. The NLI tick already computes neutral scores but silently discards them — the      
  neutral zone is exactly where "past failure informs later decision" relationships live. Confirmed missed bridge: Lesson #376 (nxs-008) and ADR #2060 (nxs-011) 
  cover the same invariant with zero edge between them after 26 days.
                                                                                                                                                                 
  Scope:                                                                                                                                                         
  1. RelationType::Informs — new enum variant in graph.rs
  2. PPR extension — 4th edges_of_type call in personalized_pagerank + positive_out_degree_weight                                                                
  3. Config — 3 new InferenceConfig fields: informs_category_pairs, nli_informs_cosine_floor (0.45), nli_informs_ppr_weight (0.6)
  4. Detection — separate HNSW scan at 0.45 cosine + Phase 8b write loop using the already-computed neutral score                                                
                                                                                                                                                                 
  Hard constraints: No schema migration, no new ML model, no new tick, W1-2 / C-14 / R-09 rayon contract preserved, domain vocabulary only in config defaults.   
                                                                                                                                                                 
  Explicitly out: Mentions/ImplementsDecision edges, config-extensible relation types, post-store NLI, changes to penalty/terminal logic.                        
                                                                                                                                                                 
  5 open questions requiring your input before architecture:                                                                                                     
                                                                  
  ┌─────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┬─────────────────────────────────────┐   
  │  #  │                                                   Question                                                   │               Default               │
  ├─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────┤   
  │ 1   │ Cap budget: shared max_graph_inference_per_tick or separate max_informs_per_tick?                            │ Combined (avoids starvation)        │
  ├─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────┤   
  │ 2   │ NLI batch structure: merge Informs candidates into existing Phase 7 batch (W1-2 preferred) or second rayon   │ Merge (option a)                    │   
  │     │ spawn?                                                                                                       │                                     │   
  ├─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────┤   
  │ 3   │ query_existing_informs_pairs dedup: directional (source_id, target_id) or symmetric?                         │ Directional (semantically correct)  │   
  ├─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ 4   │ nli.neutral > 0.5 threshold: fixed constant or configurable field?                                           │ Fixed (avoid over-parameterizing    │   
  │     │                                                                                                              │ v1)                                 │
  ├─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────┤   
  │ 5   │ Delivery gate: quantitative ICD assertion or post-delivery eval only?                                        │ Post-delivery eval                  │\
thoughts? does it align with what we talked about?

entries.title: NLI neutral-zone score is the detection signal for cross-category institutional memory edges
ADR-005 crt-030: PPR Pipeline Position — Step 6d Between 6b and 6c
ADR-004 col-031: Activate w_phase_explicit at 0.05; AC-16 Non-Separable from AC-12 (superseded by #3688)
Adding a RelationType variant requires four coordinated updates across two files or the new edge type is missing from graph traversal
